parsed_output.justification: The transcript repeatedly centers on suspicions about Mike – many participants view him as potentially seeing a revealed werewolf in the centre or implying a role swap that could have turned him into a Werewolf. Throughout the discussion, players consistently mark Mike as a suspect and urge others to vote for him. Eliminating Mike therefore gives the village the best chance to remove a potential Werewolf.
